query: DELETE FROM chat_messages WHERE bldgUserId IN (SELECT id FROM bldg_users WHERE phoneE164 LIKE '+1guest%'); DELETE FROM onboarding_flags WHERE bldgUserId IN (SELECT id FROM bldg_users WHERE phoneE164 LIKE '+1guest%'); UPDATE bldg_users SET onboardingStep = 0, paymentMethodSaved = 0, firstName = NULL, lastName = NULL, unit = NULL, buildingSlug = NULL WHERE phoneE164 LIKE '+1guest%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 24AAGG3qhGDQtYg.6dfdf33b5fab --database Fo3B6BkybMS5hGe2tFkYmf --execute DELETE FROM chat_messages WHERE bldgUserId IN (SELECT id FROM bldg_users WHERE phoneE164 LIKE '+1guest%'); DELETE FROM onboarding_flags WHERE bldgUserId IN (SELECT id FROM bldg_users WHERE phoneE164 LIKE '+1guest%'); UPDATE bldg_users SET onboardingStep = 0, paymentMethodSaved = 0, firstName = NULL, lastName = NULL, unit = NULL, buildingSlug = NULL WHERE phoneE164 LIKE '+1guest%';
